skills.label: Identify Context
skills.description: Place a work in time, culture, and function.

skills.label: Compare Function
skills.description: Explain how purpose shapes form across works.

skills.label: Visual Analysis
skills.description: Describe form, composition, and materials precisely.

skills.label: Patron and Purpose
skills.description: Connect commissioning contexts to artistic choices.

skills.label: Style Continuity/Change
skills.description: Track what persists and what shifts across periods.

skills.label: Cross-Cultural Exchange
skills.description: Explain influence, appropriation, or dialogue across cultures.

skills.label: Modern Contexts
skills.description: Link works to modernity, nation, or market forces.

skills.label: Compare Works
skills.description: Build a thesis-driven comparison using visual evidence.

skills.label: Materials and Meaning
skills.description: Show how medium and technique carry cultural meaning.

skills.label: Sacred Space
skills.description: Interpret spatial and ritual relationships.

skills.label: Power and Display
skills.description: Analyze how objects assert authority or identity.

skills.label: Diaspora and Trade Links
skills.description: Trace movement of people, goods, and styles.

skills.label: Read Architecture
skills.description: Analyze plan, elevation, ornament, and use.

skills.label: Portable Arts
skills.description: Interpret manuscripts, metalwork, textiles, or luxury objects.

skills.label: Iconography
skills.description: Decode symbols and narrative programs.

skills.label: Trade and Exchange
skills.description: Connect artworks to routes and cultural contact.

skills.label: Ritual Object
skills.description: Explain ceremonial use and community meaning.

skills.label: Contact and Change
skills.description: Analyze transformation under encounter or colonization.

skills.label: Contemporary Claims
skills.description: Articulate how recent works address identity or politics.

skills.label: Global Networks
skills.description: Situate works in biennials, markets, and media circuits.
